zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousie於大約1372年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾時，她的父親Sir Alexander Arthur Ramsey29歲，母親Katherine Lindsey29歲。她於大約1393年與John Urquhart 3rd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty在英國蘇格蘭培爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1412年9月14日在英國藍卡爾享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousie于大约1372年出生在英国苏格兰培爾时，她的父亲Sir Alexander Arthur Ramsey29岁，母亲Katherine Lindsey29岁。她于大约1393年与John Urquhart 3rd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty在英国苏格兰培爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1412年9月14日在英国藍卡爾享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ramsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: variant (the usual spelling in Scotland) of Ramsey . The Scottish Ramsays derive from Simund de Ramesie, recorded before 1175, who went to Scotland from Ramsey (Huntingdonshire).

variants.name: Ramsey
meanings: Scottish, English, and Irish (Antrim): habitational name from Ramsey (Huntingdonshire, now part of Cambridgeshire), from Old English hramsa ‘wild garlic’ + ēg ‘island, low-lying land’. Alternatively, the name may also arise from Ramsey (Essex), probably from the same etymology as the Huntingdonshire placename. However, this is unlikely to be the source of the Scottish surname. This form of the surname is also common in Ireland, where it is probably in most if not all cases an altered form of Scottish Ramsay .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousie was born about 1372, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Alexander Arthur Ramsey, was 29 and her mother, Katherine Lindsey, was 29. She married John Urquhart 3rd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty about 1393, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 14 September 1412, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousie est née environ 1372, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Alexander Arthur Ramsey, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Katherine Lindsey, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé John Urquhart 3rd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty environ 1393, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 septembre 1412, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousie um 1372 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alexander Arthur Ramsey 29 und ihre Mutter Katherine Lindsey 29. Sie hat um 1393 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom John Urquhart 3rd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. September 1412 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousie è nata il circa 1372 nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Alexander Arthur Ramsey, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Katherine Lindsey, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato John Urquhart 3rd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty circa 1393, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 14 settembre 1412, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousieが約1372年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Arthur Ramseyは29歳，母Katherine Lindseyは29歳であった。約1393年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアでJohn Urquhart 3rd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromartyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1412年9月14日にイギリスランカシュアイアで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousie(이)가 대략 1372년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alexander Arthur Ramsey(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Lindsey(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1393년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 John Urquhart 3rd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1412년 9월 14일 영국 랭카실르에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousie nasceu aproximadamente 1372, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Alexander Arthur Ramsey, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Lindsey, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com John Urquhart 3rd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty aproximadamente 1393, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de setembro de 1412, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousie родилась около 1372 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Alexander Arthur Ramsey было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Lindsey, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Urquhart 3rd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty около 1393 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 14 сентября 1412 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Agnes Ramsay of Dalhousie nació aproximadamente 1372, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Alexander Arthur Ramsey, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Katherine Lindsey, tenía 29 años. Se casó con John Urquhart 3rd of Cromarty, Sheriff of Cromarty aproximadamente 1393, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de septiembre de 1412, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años.
